name: COR
description: Developer of artificial intelligence-powered management software designed to track time automatically by giving real-time visibility on profits and delays. The company's software automates workflows, and timesheets with pre-loaded project templates that suggest hours, and provide context for every communication, keeping the flow of messages and related files for each task, project, and client, enabling firms to predict profitability, reducing work overload and improve client engagements.

name: Core Labs
description: Developer of a professional social networking platform intended to build professional identity and connection for the digital economy. . The company's platform provides launching of a new venture, learning a new skill, working towards a promotion or career milestone and closing of deal, enabling entrepreneurs to progress in less time, learn faster and cultivate powerful professional identities.

name: FreightRoll
description: Developer of a digital trade documentation and visibility platform designed to improve visibility into the supply chain. The company's platform provides a dashboard that features access to a proprietary network of carriers, book shipments, uploads loading statuses and prevents deadhead, enabling users to operate shipping activities efficiently.

name: Fyodor Biotechnologies
description: Developer of a non-invasive malaria testing technology designed to deliver a simple system to major global health problems. The company's technology helps people with a fever to diagnose malaria using a few drops of urine instead of blood, enabling healthcare professionals to help patients diagnose malaria conveniently and minimize pain and blood loss.

name: HelperGo
description: Developer of domestic service online platform designed to match families with well-trained helpers for household and eldercare needs. The company's application directly connects families in need of professional home care services (house cleaning, eldercare, babysitters, and cooking) to service providers, such as babysitters and caregivers, enabling people in need for local services to save money and improve the lifestyle while helping service providers find jobs easier.

name: Mediacao Online
description: Developer of an online mediation platform intended to assist in solving extrajudicial legal conflicts. The company's platform allows its users to resolve disputes between two or more parties by being connected to legal counsels and assists them in drawing up an agreement with an automated, binding mediation process, enabling Brazilian corporations and consumers to resolve legal disputes quickly and inexpensively without having to rely on third-party legal contractors, making the process fast and effective.

name: Myndlift
description: Developer of a professional remote neurofeedback technology designed to improve cognitive abilities. The company's technology detects and measures brain wave activity to offer a set of mind-controlled gamified exercises that are based on an evidence-based technique, enabling healthcare professionals to help patients with ADHD to strengthen their concentration.

name: 28 labs
description: Provider of fertility management services intended to offer a subscription model to fertility, to help women to have children. The company's services include offering financial plans to help women, men, and couples to have children with fertility testing, IVF, egg freezing, and sperm freezing and also offer customers a subscription plan that covers all their health care costs, enabling women and couples to preserve their fertility and has children when they're ready.

name: ShortPoint
description: Operator of web development platform intended to design corporate intranet systems. The company's technology facilitates department managers to build intranets with no coding from their existing content systems, such as office 365, sharepoint, and sap cloud portal, enabling businesses to build sharepoint pages easily.

name: SOFY
description: Developer of a no-code testing software designed to facilitate dashboard functionality testing for mobile application development. The company's software uses artificial intelligence-based trainable robots to focus on iterative application development, manages a portfolio of applications and understands how to stack up against the competition, enabling mobile application developers to test, deploy and monitor performance, reliability, functionality and user experience.

name: VCV
description: Operator of a recruiting platform intended to assist companies to hire employees. The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence for autonomously searching resumes and conducting video interviews, enabling employers to reduce efforts, increase efficiency, and save money and manpower.

name: Payment24
description: Provider of a fuel payment and fleet management system created for fleet management. The company's fleet management system integrates into gas stations and vehicles, enabling fleet owners and managers to reduce fraud and increase efficiencies.

name: Rever Moto
description: Developer of a mobile application designed to connect a global community of motorcycle enthusiasts. The company's application discovers the best places to ride, enabling motorcycle enthusiasts to record and track their rides and share their favorite roads and routes with other enthusiasts in the community easily.

name: Mailhaven
description: Developer of a mailbox application designed to track packages. The company's mailbox application permits managing of online purchases and automated tracking of shipments, enabling users to simplify package tracking.

name: Chui
description: Provider of computer vision solutions that augment any existing camera feed into intelligent, actionable data capable of identifying persons of interest, objects and more.

name: CrowdForce
description: Provider of an online platform designed to create forms online to collect quality data using any mobile device. The company's platform offers to create, save and publish forms with online form builder and it captures quality data, keep all forms in one place, analyze data and provide insights on that, enabling local & international businesses, NGOs, and Governments crowdsource reliable market about Africa.

name: WayPay
description: Operator of a payments platform intended to simplify business payments. The company's platform connects any accounts payable system and automatically reconciles payments sent to local or international suppliers from any combination of bank and credit card accounts, enabling small and medium enterprises to easily, efficiently and cost effectively make payments for their business expenses.
